title: lastrea thelypteroides
intro: Lastrea thelypteroides, also known as the Thelypteris fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Lastrea thelypteroides include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Lastrea thelypteroides can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap the medicinal benefits of this plant.
